mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.inbound_no, o.source_type, o.source_id, o.supplier_id, CASE WHEN sup.status = 'disabled' THEN CONCAT(o.supplier_name, ' [禁用]') WHEN sup.status = 'cancelled' THEN CONCAT(o.supplier_name, ' [已注销]') ELSE o.supplier_name END AS supplier_name, o.source_order_id, o.source_order_no, o.org_id, o.receiving_org_id, rorg.org_name AS receiving_org_name, o.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, o.total_amount, o.remark, o.attachments, o.status, o.version, o.post_status, o.post_error_message, o.submitted_at, o.submitted_by, o.submitter_name, o.approved_at, o.approve_remark, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM wms_inbound_order o LEFT JOIN scm_supplier sup ON sup.id = o.supplier_id AND sup.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON w.id = o.warehouse_id AND w.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_organization rorg ON rorg.id = o.receiving_org_id AND rorg.deleted = 0 WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted = 0
SELECT version FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
